## Problem

What gap or pain point does this address?

## Proposed solution

Describe the change you want to see.

## Skill / area

- [ ] UI/UX skill or references
- [ ] Frontend skill or references
- [ ] AGENTS.md / routing
- [ ] Eval / CI / validation
- [ ] Documentation / setup guides
- [ ] Other: ___

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about?

## Willing to contribute?

- [ ] Yes, I can open a PR
- [ ] No, suggestion only
